title: The position of principal of basic education, Sauvosaari school
meta_description: The position of principal of basic education, Sauvosaari school in Kemi at Tuntematon. We are looking for an experienced principal of basic education to join...
description: We are looking for an experienced principal of basic education to join the Sauvosaari school in Kemi, Finland. As a permanent position starting August 1, 2026, you will manage pedagogical activities, personnel, finances, and everyday life at this multi-cultural elementary school with about 170 students in grades 1-6. You must be able to inspire, support, and lead the community while ensuring safe, effective learning environments for all students and staff members. The ideal candidate has strong administrative and financial management skills, as well as experience working in a multicultural setting. A background in school management tasks, learning support, special education, and working with Guardians and stakeholders is also highly valued. This position offers a meaningful leadership role, the opportunity to develop basic education within the city's strategic whole, a professionally competent work community, and support from Kemi for front-line work and management development. The salary of 5437.36 + TVA supplement is currently offered, with a trial period of six months when filling the position. Applications are accepted through Kuntarekry, and interviews will take place after the application period. A criminal record extract (504/2002) and an approved statement of health status must be
what_we_expect: Experience and competence in school management tasks
Learning support and special education experience
Working in a multicultural school experience
job_responsibilities: Manage the Sauvosaari school's pedagogical activities, personnel, finances and everyday life holistically
Community spirit, safe everyday life, good student learning and comprehensive growth are important to us
Smooth cooperation with guardians, stakeholders and networks
what_we_offer: A meaningful and effective management role
The opportunity to develop the school and basic education as part of the city's strategic whole
A professionally competent and committed work community
Support from the city of Kemi for front-line work and management development, e.g. E-Passport
search_keywords: principal, Sauvosaari school, principal position, basic education, Kemi, teaching staff eligibility requirements

title: Attendance counselor
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: "Join our team as an Attendance Counselor at Huittinen City Cultural Committee! Full-time opportunity with permanent employment. Ideal for those with school...
description: We are looking for a qualified Attendance Counselor to join our team in Huittinen, Finland. This position offers the opportunity to work full-time and enjoy permanent employment. The ideal candidate will have experience as a school guidance counselor or equivalent vocational training, along with practical skills working with children and young people. Salary is determined according to KVTES guidelines, and candidates must provide an acceptable medical certificate and criminal record extract before being confirmed for the position. Interested parties should apply using the electronic application form at www.kuntarekry.fi (search "Huittinen") or by sending documents via mail to Huittinen City Cultural Committee, Risto Rytin katu 36, 32700 Huittinen. The application period runs until April 21, 2026 at 12:00. For more information, contact vice-rector Katja Haavisto (tel. 044 560 4306, email: firstname.lastname@edu.huittinen.fi) or principal Maarit Malmberg (tel. 044 560 4305, email: firstname.surname@huittinen.fi). Located in the picturesque town of Huittinen, known for

The application period ends on April 21, 2026 at 12:00.
Positive attitude and reliability
job_responsibilities: Personal school visit instructor
Team instructor
Resource instructor

title: Construction Worker Developer
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Truescape Oy, Helsinki: Construction worker opportunity for escape games installation & maintenance! 🏛️💼 Competitive wages + electrical knowledge needed.
description: Truescape Oy, located in Helsinki, Finland, is seeking an experienced construction worker for their team that specializes in the installation and maintenance of escape games. This part-time position offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and includes tasks such as installing circuit breakers, sockets, extending cables, and performing light construction work. The ideal candidate should have a driver's license and possess electrical knowledge to handle low-voltage devices commonly found in escape game installations. Regularly working indoors at the company’s offices or occasional installations at other locations across Finland, this role is perfect for someone looking to combine their skills with a dynamic and growing industry.
what_we_expect: Driver's license
Part-time job, 2-4 days a week according to agreement
You must have a driver's license.
job_responsibilities: Electrical knowledge is important because the games often have 5V / 12V low-voltage devices and their installation and diagnosis are part of the job.
Light construction work, occasional installation of plasterboard, making boxes and doors, sanding but not actual heavy construction work.
You must have a driver's license.
what_we_offer: Wage support considered an advantage
Nice crew installing escape games and maintenance work is varied
You must have a driver's license.
search_keywords: construction worker developer construction maintenance escape games electrical knowledge low-voltage devices driver's license part-time job

title: Chef, Tarkastamo, Oulu Torinranta
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: "Chef opening at Tarkastamo, event and restaurant complex in Torinranta, Oulu. Strong culinary skills, teamwork, and passion for quality needed. Permanent
description: We are looking for chefs for permanent employment at Tarkastamo, an event and restaurant complex set to open in Torinranta, Oulu in the summer of 2026. As part of this ambitious project, we expect our chef to contribute to building something new through professional, caring, and passionate food preparation within a team that values cooperation and dedication. We are seeking someone with strong culinary skills, experience as a chef, and an understanding of how quality begins from careful work, respect for raw materials, and effective teamwork. We offer you a permanent job in a new and ambitious entity where working together can be seen every day. Our company culture emphasizes a positive atmosphere and functional cooperation, ensuring that your contributions are valued and recognized. We provide a salary according to MaRa TES, reflecting the market rate for chefs at this level. At Tarkastamo, you will have the opportunity to gain valuable work experience and develop your skills within a new restaurant and event complex where food, drink, and service form an experiential whole. You will also be part of a team that values seasons, raw materials, and regional flavors, as well as international cuisines in harmony with maritime Oulu. We offer you nice and inspiring colleagues and a work community where your efforts are recognized

You appreciate neat and planned working as well as safe and functional working methods.

title: Waitress, Tarkastamo, Oulu Torinranta
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: "Join TARKASTAMO RAVINTOLA's growing team as a Waitress at Oulu's Torinranta! Experience memorable service opportunities in an exciting new restaurant complex.
description: We are looking for experienced waiters at Tarkastamo, an exciting new restaurant and event complex set to open in Oulu's Torinranta this summer. As part of our ambitious team, we expect you to bring your genuine passion for customer service and a strong professional background to create memorable experiences for our guests. With fluent English skills and a solid understanding of the kitchen, you'll be able to work alongside talented colleagues in a warm, inspiring environment where everyone's contribution is valued. We offer a permanent position as part of our growing entity, with opportunities for continuous growth and development within a new restaurant and event complex. Our team values hard work, pride in one’s profession, and a positive attitude towards collaboration. With a focus on quality service and an inviting atmosphere, we aim to provide a warm, relaxed dining experience that reflects the best of both local and international flavors. If you're ready to join us in creating unforgettable moments for our customers, please apply with your CV and recommenders as soon as possible.
what_we_expect: Messages openly, honestly and constructively. Cooperation and a good atmosphere are important values ​​for us: together we are more and stronger.

You do your work with a smile on your face, you take responsibility for your own work and help your colleagues if necessary. You have a genuine interest in Tarkastamo's offer, which lives according to the seasons, you know how to tell our story and convey a good feeling to our customers.
You speak fluent Finnish and you also do well in English, so that our international guests feel welcome.
job_responsibilities: You are a good person to join us and you approach customer service with a genuine heart, customers are always your number one priority. You have strong professional expertise in the field and have previously worked in similar, demanding customer service positions.
You speak fluent Finnish and you also do well in English, so that our international guests feel welcome.

You have the qualifications required for the position, as well as a dispensing and hygiene passport. We value wine knowledge and other evidence of drinking knowledge and the desire to further develop your knowledge.
what_we_offer: We offer you nice and inspiring colleagues and a work community where work is done with a lot of heart and professional pride. You will gain valuable work experience and the opportunity to develop your skills as part of a new and ambitious restaurant and event complex.
We offer you a permanent job as part of a new and ambitious entity, where working together can be seen in everyday life.
Salary: according to MaRa TES.

title: Butler, Inspectorate, Oulu Torinranta
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Butler, Inspectorate, Oulu Torinranta in Oulu at TARKASTAMO RAVINTOLA. TARKASTAMO RAVINTOLA is seeking a Butler for their Oulu Torinranta event and
description: TARKASTAMO RAVINTOLA is seeking a Butler for their Oulu Torinranta event and restaurant complex, set to open in 2026. As a Butler, you will be responsible for the operational activities of the hall, ensuring smooth and high-quality service. Your duties include managing reservations, serving efficiently, and pairing wines with food. You'll work closely with the restaurant manager, influencing the operation of the hall and developing your role through cooperation. We offer a permanent position in an ambitious new complex where responsibility is valued and expertise is recognized. Our expectations are strong experience in à la carte restaurants and the ability to take on shifts responsibly. You should lead by example, ensuring both customer satisfaction and team functionality. Knowledge of wine and drinks is essential, as you'll recommend and pair wines with food dishes. We prioritize a good atmosphere and cooperation, where customers enjoy themselves and return frequently. Our goal is to provide a warm, quality restaurant experience that harmonizes offer, service, and atmosphere. Join us in Oulu's Torinranta for an event and dining experience that blends local production with international flavors, all within the maritime environment of Tarkastamo.

Ability to take responsibility for the entire shift
Understanding of sales and profitability in everyday life
Knowledge of wine and drinks, ability to recommend and pair wines with food dishes
Openly, honestly, constructively message
Value cooperation and good atmosphere
job_responsibilities: Operational activities of the restaurant hall
Ensure smooth, high-quality service and customer-oriented experience
Rational and productive placement of reservations
Overall responsibility for serving on your turn
Pairing of wines with food portions as part of the experiential offering

Salary in accordance with MaRa TES, taking into account experience and competence
Salary: in accordance with MaRa TES, taking into account experience and competence.

title: Local nurse for part-time work for home care in Lohja
salary_range: €16-18/h plus possible shift bonuses and 9% holiday pay
meta_description: Local nurse for part-time work in Lohja: Apply now! 🏠✨ Requirements include a nursing degree, excellent language skills, and previous catheter change...
description: We are looking for skilled local nurses with experience in home care, specifically for part-time work in Lohja. Our team provides comprehensive assistance to elderly customers, including daily activities, basic care, medication administration, catheter changes, and more. Ideal candidates will thrive in a multicultural healthcare environment, ensuring the safety of our clients. A nursing degree is required, along with excellent oral and written Finnish language skills. Previous experience in changing catheters is essential. We offer competitive salaries ranging from 16 to 18 euros per hour plus flexible working hours and a 9% commission on sales. Additionally, we provide varied training opportunities and good orientation programs. If you're interested in joining our growing team, please apply by email to info@samscare.fi.

title: Planning Assistant
meta_description: Planning Assistant | Rauman kaupunki - Join our dedicated team in Rauma! 🏙️💼 Are you passionate about urban development and creative problem-solving? We're...
description: We are looking for a zoning assistant at Rauman kaupunki to join our dedicated team of professionals in the planning and world heritage unit. This permanent position offers meaningful work tasks that contribute to the smooth daily life of residents and the overall development of the city, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a fulfilling career. With a focus on administrative office tasks related to drawing up formulas, such as financial management and case management, this role provides ample opportunities for growth and skill enhancement within a vibrant maritime and cultural setting. Located in Rauma, a bright, maritime and cultural city of approximately 39,000 inhabitants, the team collaborates with over ten people. The unit is part of the technical industry and works closely with two world heritage sites: the sea, an archipelago, and a large harbor. As such, this role requires someone who can effectively manage multiple projects and assist in the interaction procedures related to plan planning. To apply for this position, please submit your application electronically through www.rauma.fi/rekry. For more information or to contact the planning director Juha Eskolin (tel: 044 793 3660, email: juha.eskolin@rauma.fi) or the planning architect Outi Virol

Submitting an application: Electronically through the system (www.rauma.fi/rekry)

Located in the middle of Ruukki villages, this position offers part-time employment with a focus on serving customers from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. weekdays and Saturdays from 9 a.m. to 1 p.m., complemented by a Maxx pharmacy program. The pharmacist will work alongside two pharmacists and medical technicians in Pohja's pharmacy, providing pharmaceutical customer service and possibly dose distribution tasks. Interested applicants should apply with resumes by April 20th to mari.torronen@apteekit.net for more information.

This role involves creating a learning environment that encourages children's creativity and exploration while fostering their social development. We value teachers who can apply multicultural teaching strategies and different methods effectively. The ideal candidate should have an early childhood education teacher qualification, excellent Finnish and English language skills, strong cooperation abilities, positive problem-solving skills, and the ability to connect with children genuinely.
